oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Amendments to Lacey: Why We Should All Care
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Mock, Adrianne
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: This item originally appeared in AFA Watchbird Volume 49 Number 2 (July 2022).The following is an excerpt from the full PDF link.Why We Should All Care! by Adrianne MockIn a nutshell, the AMENDMENTS to the Lacey Act are a bill that was proposed by Senator Rubio (FL). It adds several requirements and restrictions that are bad for animals, bad for animal ownership, bad for breeders, bad for rescues. It was originally slipped (secretly) into the middle of a 3,000-page piece of proposed legislation (the America COMPETES Act). Fortunately, it was caught in time.Click the PDF link associated with this item to view the complete item as originally published.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: AFA Watchbird; Vol. 49 No. 2 (2022): Watchbird July 2022; 17
